ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "sim_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "sim_type" TEXT /* Type of the simulation (e.g., eta_Cl, eta_V1, eta_Q, eta_V2) */,
  "params" TEXT /* Simulation parameters (e.g., eta_Cl_simulated, eta_V1_simulated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation that produced this result */,
  "rep" INTEGER /* Replication number of the simulation */,
  "eta_Cl_simulated" REAL /* Simulated eta_Cl value */,
  "eta_V1_simulated" REAL /* Simulated eta_V1 value */,
  "eta_Q_simulated" REAL /* Simulated eta_Q value */,
  "eta_V2_simulated" REAL /* Simulated eta_V2 value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of the filter (e.g., All, Custom) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the filter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the filter was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the color was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the color was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split */,
  "split_name" TEXT /* Name of the split */,
  "split_type" TEXT /* Type of the split (e.g., All, Custom) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the split was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the split was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation that this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_sim_id FOREIGN KEY ("sim_id") REFERENCES simulations ("sim_id")
)
